kaikki_english.description: Kaikki.org pre-parsed Wiktionary English JSONL (per-language page). The canonical entry point is https://kaikki.org/dictionary/rawdata.html; today's per-language file is en-extract.jsonl (+ .gz). Note: Kaikki marks per-language post-processed files as DEPRECATED and is steering users toward the raw Wiktextract dump + running wiktextract locally; pin a snapshot if you wire this into CI.

open_english_wordnet.description: Open English WordNet — used as lower-priority example backfill for entries where the Kaikki sense has no example.
